---
name: User Story with Acceptance Criteria
about: Suggest a user capability
title: "[ STORY ]"
labels: ''
assignees: ''

---

### User  Story

> **As [persona]:**
> 
> - This part identifies the user or role for whom the story is written. It specifies who the end-user is and their characteristics, allowing developers to understand their needs and motivations. 
> 
> **I want to [goal]:**
> 
> - This part describes the user's desired action or functionality they want to achieve. It focuses on what the user is trying to do. 
> 
> **So that [benefit]:**
> 
> - This part explains the reason or value behind the user's desire. It highlights why the functionality is important to the user and what they hope to gain from it. 

### Acceptance Criteria

> **Given that:** 
> 
> - This part sets the context or preconditions for the scenario. It describes the state of the system or the user's situation before an action is taken.
> 
> **When:** 
> 
> - This part describes the action or event that the user performs.
> 
> **Then:** 
> 
> - This part outlines the expected outcome or result after the action is taken. It specifies what should happen if the action is successful. 

<hr>

**Implementation notes**
